description: Stage 2 verification steps (TypeScript + Jest). build compiles ALL packages in dependency order (tsc), which is needed so cross-package imports resolve; test runs Jest on only the affected packages (${filter} = changed package + its dependents). verify-upgrade.sh picks packageOverrides[<dep>] if present, else defaults.

jest.description: Jest upgrades most often break tests; run tests first for fast feedback, then build.
